stages.name: 基础构建
stages.pdf: KET 语法 PDF 第 1-40 页

cards.title: 名词复数
cards.rule: 一般名词加 -s；以 s/x/sh/ch 结尾加 -es；辅音+y 变 ies；f/fe 变 ves
cards.note: 不规则：child→children, man→men, woman→women, tooth→teeth, foot→feet
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 12-15 页

cards.title: be 动词和 have 动词
cards.rule:
be: I am / he/she/it is / we/you/they are
have: I/you/we/they have / he/she/it has
cards.note:
be 否定：am not/is not( isn't)/are not(aren't)
have 否定：don't have / doesn't have
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 16-20 页

cards.title: 一般现在时
cards.rule:
主语 + 动词原形（第三人称单数加 s/es）
否定：don't/doesn't + 动词原形
疑问句：Do/Does + 主语 + 动词原形？
cards.note: 第三人称单数加 s 规则与名词复数相同
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 21-25 页

cards.title: 人称代词和物主代词
cards.rule:
主格：I/you/he/she/it/we/they
宾格：me/you/him/her/it/us/them
形容词性物主：my/your/his/her/its/our/their
名词性物主：mine/yours/his/hers/its/ours/theirs
cards.note: its（它的）和 it's（it is）不一样！
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 26-30 页

cards.title: 数词和量词
cards.rule:
基数词：one/two/three...
序数词：first/second/third...
量词：some/any/many/much/a lot of/a few/a little
examples: She is the first in class.
cards.note:
many + 可数名词 / much + 不可数名词
a few + 可数 / a little + 不可数
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 31-35 页

stages.name: 句子扩展
stages.pdf: KET 语法 PDF 第 41-80 页

cards.title: 现在进行时
cards.rule:
主语 + be (am/is/are) + 动词 ing
表示正在发生的动作
cards.note: 动词加 ing 规则：一般加 ing（read→reading）；以 e 结尾去 e 加 ing（write→writing）；重读闭音节双写（run→running）
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 41-45 页

cards.title: 情态动词
cards.rule:
can/could（能）
must（必须）
should（应该）
may/might（可能）
后面直接加动词原形
cards.note:
情态动词没有人称变化，否定直接在后面加 not
mustn't = 禁止 / don't have to = 不必
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 46-50 页

cards.title: 形容词比较级和最高级
cards.rule:
比较级：short→shorter, big→bigger, happy→happier, beautiful→more beautiful
最高级：short→the shortest, the most beautiful
examples: She is more careful than me.
cards.note: 不规则：good→better→best, bad→worse→worst, much/many→more→most, little→less→least
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 51-55 页

cards.title: 疑问句
cards.rule:
一般疑问句：be/do/can + 主语 ...？
特殊疑问句：疑问词(what/when/where/who/why/how) + 一般疑问句？
examples: How many brothers do you have?
cards.note: 疑问词：what(什么)/when(何时)/where(哪里)/who(谁)/why(为什么)/how(怎样)/which(哪个)
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 56-60 页

cards.title: 介词
cards.rule:
时间：in(月/年/早中晚) / on(具体某天) / at(时刻)
地点：in(在里面) / on(在上面) / at(在某点) / under(在下面) / next to(旁边)
运动：to(向) / from(从) / into(进入)
examples: The book is on the table.
He goes to school by bus.
cards.note: 常见搭配：at night / in the morning / on Monday / on holiday / on foot
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 61-70 页

cards.title: 一般过去时（规则动词）
cards.rule:
主语 + 动词过去式
规则动词加 ed：work→worked, live→lived, stop→stopped, carry→carried
否定：didn't + 动词原形
疑问：Did + 主语 + 动词原形？
cards.note: 时间标志词：yesterday, last week, ... ago, in 2020
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 81-85 页

cards.title: 一般过去时（不规则动词）
cards.rule:
不规则动词需要单独记忆
常用不规则动词表见右侧
examples: go→went, see→saw, eat→ate, have→had, do→did, say→said, make→made, take→took, buy→bought, get→got, come→came, give→gave, know→knew, think→thought, tell→told, feel→felt
cards.note: PET 高频不规则动词约 50 个，集中记忆更有效
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 86-90 页

cards.title: There be 句型
cards.rule:
There is/was + 单数/不可数名词
There are/were + 复数名词
表示
examples: There is a book on the desk.
There was a party last night.
cards.note:
否定：There isn't / aren't / wasn't / weren't
疑问句：Is/Are/Was/Were there...?
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 91-95 页

cards.title: 可数名词和不可数名词
cards.rule:
可数名词：可以数，有复数形式（apple/apples）
不可数名词：不能数，没有复数（water/rice/information）
常用修饰词见右侧
examples: 可数：an apple, two books, many students
不可数：some water, a glass of milk, much time
both：some, a lot of, lots of, plenty of
cards.note: 常见不可数名词：water/milk/rice/bread/meat/information/advice/furniture/money/news/homework/weather/traffic
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 96-100 页

cards.title: 连词
cards.rule:
and（和/而且）
but（但是）
or（或者/否则）
so（所以）
because（因为）
when（当...时）
if（如果）
examples: Hurry up or you'll be late.
I stayed home because it rained.
cards.note: because 和 so 不能同时用在一句话里！✗ Because it rained, so I stayed home.
cards.pdf_ref: KET 语法 PDF 第 101-110 页

stages.name: PET 入门
stages.pdf: PET 语法 PDF 第 1-50 页

cards.title: 现在完成时
cards.rule:
主语 + have/has + 过去分词
表示：①已经完成的事 ②过去的经历 ③持续到现在的状态
examples: She has never been to London.
Have you ever seen a tiger?
They have lived here for 5 years.
cards.note: 时间标志词：already, yet, ever, never, just, for + 时间段, since + 时间点
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 1-10 页

cards.title: 被动语态（现在时）
cards.rule:
主语 + am/is/are + 过去分词 + (by ...)
强调动作承受者，而非执行者
examples: English is spoken in many countries.
The window was broken by Tom.
These books are sold in that shop.
cards.note: 主动变被动：宾语变主语，动词变 be+过去分词，主语变 by+宾语
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 11-18 页

cards.title: 不定式和动名词
cards.rule:
to + 动词原形（不定式）
动词 + ing（动名词）
有些词只能接不定式，有些只能接动名词
cards.note:
常见接不定式：want/hope/decide/plan/need/learn/agree
常见接动名词：enjoy/finish/mind/avoid/suggest/practice/keep
接两者意义不同：remember/forget/stop/try
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 19-25 页

cards.title: 定语从句（基础）
cards.rule:
先行词 + who/which/that + 从句
who 指人 / which 指物 / that 指人或物
examples: The boy who is reading is my brother.
The book which I bought is interesting.
This is the house that Jack built.
cards.note:
who/which/that 在从句中作宾语时可以省略：
The book (which) I read was good.
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 26-35 页

cards.title: 条件句（第一类）
cards.rule:
If + 一般现在时，主语 + will/can/may + 动词原形
表示可能发生的真实条件
examples: If it rains, I will stay home.
If you study hard, you can pass the exam.
What will you do if you are late?
cards.note: 主将从现：if 从句用一般现在时，主句用将来时
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 36-42 页

stages.name: PET 冲刺
stages.pdf: PET 语法 PDF 第 51-151 页

cards.title: 过去完成时
cards.rule:
主语 + had + 过去分词
表示
——某一过去动作之前已经完成的动作
examples: When I arrived, the train had left.
She had already eaten before I came.
They had never seen snow before last winter.
cards.note: 常与 when/before/after/by the time 连用
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 51-60 页

cards.title: 被动语态（过去时）
cards.rule:
主语 + was/were + 过去分词 + (by ...)
表示过去发生的被动动作
examples: The windows were cleaned by my dad.
cards.note:
现在完成被动：have/has + been + 过去分词
The work has been finished.
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 61-70 页

cards.title: 条件句（第二类）
cards.rule:
If + 一般过去时，主语 + would/could/might + 动词原形
表示不太可能实现的虚拟条件
examples: If I were you, I would study harder.
If I had a million dollars, I would travel around the world.
If she knew the answer, she would tell us.
cards.note: be 动词在 if 从句中统一用 were（不用 was）
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 71-80 页

cards.title: 间接引语
cards.rule:
直接引语变间接引语时：
① 时态倒退：现在→过去 / 过去→过去完成
② 人称变化
③ 时间地点变化
examples: She said, 'I am tired.' → She said she was tired.
He said, 'I will come.' → He said he would come.
'Do you like it?' → He asked if I liked it.
cards.note:
时态变化：am/is→was, have/has→had, will→would, can→could
today→that day, now→then, here→there
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 81-95 页

cards.title: 定语从句（进阶）
cards.rule:
whom（指人，作宾语）
whose（指所属关系）
where（指地点）
when（指时间）
非限制性定语从句用逗号隔开
examples: The man whom you met is my uncle.
That's the girl whose mother is a doctor.
This is the school where I studied.
I remember the day when we first met.
cards.note:
非限制性定语从句不能用 that：
My mother, who is a teacher, loves reading.
cards.pdf_ref: PET 语法 PDF 第 96-110 页
